subcodes.first_line: These are the verses of God, the All-Protecting, the Self-Subsisting, which have been sent down in truth from the heaven of exalted glory, and verily they are God's testimony [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تلک آیات الله المهیمن القیوم قد نزلت بالحق من سماء عز مرفوع و انها لحجه الله
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @station of the Manifestation of God, @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God, @thankfulness; gratitude, @spiritual transformation, @chastisement and requital
